list.vod_blurb: Follows the employees of airlines companies who have signed a contract with AZT, an illegal medicati
list.vod_content: Follows the employees of airlines companies who have signed a contract with AZT, an illegal medication in many countries at this moment, fearing that it will be the only solution available for diagnosis.
